subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! These are souls whom Thou hast chosen to be enkindled by the fire of Thy love and whom Thou hast singled out to be illumined by the light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان هولاء نفوس انتخبتهم لیصطلوا بنار محبتک و اخترتهم لیتنوروا بنور
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
